# Bhaumic Singh

> Full stack software engineer building web, android, AI, and cloud products with bleeding edge technologies.

## About

Bhaumic Singh (भौमिक सिंह) is a full stack software engineer based in Prayagraj, India. Currently working at KarkhanaHub.com building fast, reliable systems for modern web and android products. Graduate from ITER, SOA University.

## Images

- Profile Photo: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/profile.png
- Banner: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/space-shooter.png
- Banner (Animated): https://bhaumicsingh.dev/space-shooter.gif
- Gravatar Avatar: https://gravatar.com/avatar/bhaumic?s=256

## Expertise

- Web Development: React, TypeScript, TanStack, Next.js, Node.js, Svelte, SolidJS
- Android Development: Flutter, Dart, Kotlin
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, GCP, Azure, Cloudflare, Terraform, Docker, Jenkins
- AI/ML: Python, model integration, AI-powered applications
- Systems: Go, Rust, C++
- Databases: Redis, PostgreSQL, SQL
